title: Repository artifact previews and editable overview
summary: Repository pages now keep inactive tabs visually quiet, let users edit the locally saved repository overview description, render README copying controls, extend the snapshot timeline connector through all entries, and show image artifacts inline with a larger modal preview backed by local artifact serving.
userVisibleChange: Repository tabs now only underline the active tab, the overview description can be edited locally, README content can be copied, snapshot timelines scroll with a continuous connector, and artifact screenshots display directly in the page with an enlarged closeable preview modal.

risks.title: Repository description is browser-local
risks.mitigation: The API has no repository description field today, so the UI stores edits in localStorage under the repository name and falls back to the default copy when unset.

timeline.title: Cleaned repository tab and overview state
timeline.summary: Removed inactive tab indicators and wired the overview description to a local editable value shared by the header and right rail.

timeline.title: Served local artifact images
timeline.summary: Added a bounded artifact file route under /api/repos/{repo}/artifacts and used it for .eve/artifacts image thumbnails.

timeline.title: Improved README and timeline panels
timeline.summary: Added README copy action and changed timeline connector rendering so long scrollable lists keep their vertical line across entries.

timeline.title: Verified desktop and mobile repository views
timeline.summary: Checked overview, artifact thumbnails, preview modal, and mobile layouts in Playwright after build and Go tests passed.

decisions.title: Persist description edits locally
decisions.rationale: Repository summaries currently do not include editable description storage, so localStorage gives users control without changing the snapshot schema or repository metadata contract.

decisions.title: Preview local artifact images through the API
decisions.rationale: Browser pages cannot load repository-relative filesystem paths directly, and serving from the known artifacts directory keeps previews constrained to recorded EVE outputs.

validation.output: tsc --noEmit and vite build completed; embedded UI dist regenerated.

validation.command: Playwright repository page checks at http://localhost:4324/repositories/eve
validation.output: Verified inactive tabs have no underline, README copy is visible, artifacts render image thumbnails, modal preview opens/closes, console has no warnings, and mobile overview/artifact layouts remain usable.

artifacts.description: Desktop overview showing active-only tab indicator, README copy control, editable overview rail, and timeline beside README.
Artifacts tab showing local screenshot thumbnails rendered inline.
Image artifact preview modal with description and close control.
Mobile artifacts view with inline screenshot cards.
Mobile overview tab with active-only indicator and responsive header controls.
